positive: A stylized, whimsical depiction of a mountain fox (Kitsune) standing among illuminated autumn forest flora. The fox should have elegant, flowing lines and a mischievous, gentle expression. It is surrounded by abstract geometric shapes resembling falling maple leaves and star constellations. Use a vibrant color palette dominated by burnt orange, deep indigo, forest green, and gold accents. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau poster art and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, emphasizing strong black outlines and negative space. Central, symmetrical composition. High contrast, flat graphic style suitable for screen printing, vector art quality, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, poor anatomy, deformed, messy, grayscale, realistic photo, signature, logo, trademark, busy background, distracting elements
